reviews.comment:
Una vez compre una hamburguesa y cuando salí se me volo toda la hamburguesa JAJAJA y la chica (que trabajaba ahi) me dio otra hamburguesa gratis, muchas gracias chica ♡, gracias a vos no me mori de hambre JAJAJAJA

(Translated by Google)
Once I bought a hamburger and when I left it all blew away LOL and the girl (who worked there) gave me another hamburger for free, thank you so much girl ♡, thanks to you I didn't starve to death LOL
